backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that manages documents with blob storage, providing functions to add, retrieve, list, and delete documents with owner-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (upload interface, vault dashboard, encryption, authentication, visual theme) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing their purpose and key functionality in the document vault application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables defining a dark theme with charcoal backgrounds and warm amber accents for both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the application with ThemeProvider, renders VaultDashboard inside Layout, and includes Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that displays a login screen with Internet Identity button for unauthenticated users and renders children for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/DocumentItem.tsx: Component rendering individual document with metadata, download button (with decryption), and delete button with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/DocumentList.tsx: Component that fetches and displays a list of user documents with loading, error, and empty states, rendering DocumentItem for each document.
frontend/src/components/DocumentUpload.t: React component for uploading documents with drag-and-drop support, encrypting files using the useEncryption hook, and uploading them to the backend with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component providing header with logo and user identity display, background pattern, and footer with branding and attribution.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useEncryption.ts: Hook providing client-side file encryption/decryption using AES-GCM with keys derived from the user's Internet Identity principal via PBKDF2.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login/logout, identity persistence, and status tracking throughout the authentication lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for document operations: fetching user documents, adding new documents, and deleting documents with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme colors, including vault-specific amber/orange accent colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/VaultDashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying document upload and list components with authentication guard and refresh trigger for updating the document list after uploads.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining a dark-mode-enabled design system with custom color tokens using OKLCH color space, extended typography, container queries, animations for accordions, and custom font families (Inter and JetBrains Mono).
project_state.json: Project state file for a Blockchain-Based Secure Document Vault application tracking completed features (upload interface, dashboard, client-side encryption, Internet Identity auth, visual theme) and pending backend features (document storage, CRUD operations, access control).
